text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Normally, Umamusume who sought victory in the
Classic Triple Crown go on to run medium- and
long-distance races. But King Halo is different.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To become first-rate in her own way, she chooses
to run in the Takamatsunomiya Kinen, a race that
decides the best sprinter. She resolves to not
have any regrets even if she doesn't place well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She isn't alone. I've come prepared to start anew
as well, in pursuit of this goal.
